Reason

- Easier to understand

Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues before creating this report.
- [ ] I verified that this documentation issue has not already been reported.
- [ ] My suggestion is clear and actionable.
- [ ] I am willing to submit a pull request for this improvement (optional).
